events.headline: ISS (ZARYA) raised its orbit by 1.79 km
events.explanation: On 2026-07-04 the semi-major axis of ISS (ZARYA) changed by +1794 m (z = 102 against a 18 m noise floor). That is 102 times this object's typical epoch-to-epoch variation. The step is consistent with a orbit raise.
